question: What best describes the trend in the defect rate shown in the chart over the years?

options.A: There was a dramatic drop in the defect rate
options.B: The defect rate stayed exactly the same
options.C: There was a steady but modest decline in the defect rate
options.D: The trend in the defect rate cannot be determined from this chart

explanation: The y-axis uses a very tight range (7.44–7.66%) instead of a more informative 0–10% context, which visually exaggerates variability. The actual net change is about 0.22% over the period, which is modest in the full context.
